user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] Scheduled Calendar event with non-Microsoft external attendee detected initiated for Fabrikam Residences.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Kevin Lee <kevin.lee@fabrikamresi.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-17 16:59 EST
Subject: account health - Action Required

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about account health. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
To: Kevin Lee <kevin.lee@fabrikamresi.com>
Date: 2024-01-05 11:30 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Fabrikam Residences account health

There's been a change in our timeline for account health. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

Meeting: account health Discussion - Fabrikam Residences
Date: 2024-03-18
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Kevin Lee (Fabrikam Residences), Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft)

[00:01:15] Kevin Lee (Fabrikam Residences): Appreciate everyone making time. The main agenda today is account health.

[00:05:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): Our VP reviewed this and has concerns about performance requirements. Can we address those?

[00:08:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): Our director reviewed this and has concerns about vendor dependencies. Can we address those?

[00:10:00] Kevin Lee (Fabrikam Residences): Let me add some context -- we've been working on performance requirements and found that there's a dependency on the security team's review that could delay us.

[00:12:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): Our architect reviewed this and has concerns about partner engagement. Can we address those?

[00:16:00] Kevin Lee (Fabrikam Residences): Let me add some context -- we've been working on performance requirements and found that the current vendor contract has a 90-day exit clause we need to plan around.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Fabrikam Residences: the current vendor contract has a 90-day exit clause we need to plan around
